scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace=@kavach/schema-catalog && concurrently --kill-others --names API,DESKTOP "npm run dev --workspace=@kavach/api" "npm start --workspace=@kavach/desktop"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@kavach/schema-catalog && npm run typecheck --workspace=@kavach/shared-types && npm run typecheck --workspace=@kavach/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=@kavach/desktop && npm run lint --workspace=@kavach/desktop
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@kavach/schema-catalog && npm run build --workspace=@kavach/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=@kavach/api && npm run package --workspace=@kavach/desktop
